product_overview: ProjectFlow is an on-premise project and task management web application with Kanban boards, dashboards, and lightweight authentication designed for small teams. It emphasizes privacy by storing data locally (SQLite) and supports drag-and-drop task management and basic project workflows.
core_goals: Provide a secure, on-premise project & task management tool for small teams (<=50 users).
Enable quick task management via Kanban drag-and-drop and per-user task views.
Present actionable team and task metrics through a dashboard and interactive widgets.
Offer simple session-based authentication with guarded routes and graceful error handling.
Make project and user configuration accessible via a settings area and ensure daily backups of the local database.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allow existing users to authenticate with email and password to create a session and access protected pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See dashboard at /

Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with unknown or incorrect email -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See an error message indicating invalid credentials -> Remain on /login

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Allow new users to create an account by submitting required registration details.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill registration details -> Click Register button to submit -> See registration success confirmation -> Redirected to /login
Navigate to /register -> Fill registration details using an existing email -> Click Register button to submit -> See validation error indicating email already exists -> Remain on /register

features.name: Dashboard Viewing
features.description: Display overall metrics, user-specific summaries, and interactive widgets to provide a high-level overview of projects and tasks.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See dashboard widgets and charts -> Interact with a widget -> See updated metric or expanded detail
Navigate to / without a valid session cookie -> Be redirected to /login

features.name: Board Management
features.description: Provide a Kanban-style board where users can create, move, and update task cards across workflow columns.
user_flows: Navigate to /board -> View Kanban board with columns -> Create new tasks -> Fill task title and required fields -> Click create task -> See new task appear in the To Do column -> Drag and drop tasks from To Do to In Progress -> See task status updated
Navigate to /board without a valid session cookie -> Be redirected to /login

features.name: My Tasks
features.description: Show the authenticated user's assigned tasks in a list with filtering and quick actions such as marking complete.
user_flows: Navigate to /my-tasks -> View task list -> Filter tasks by status or other criteria -> Click a task to open details -> Mark task as complete -> See task marked as done in the list
Navigate to /my-tasks without a valid session cookie -> Be redirected to /login

features.name: Project Management
features.description: List projects, allow creating new projects, and view project details (members, color labels, and associated tasks).
user_flows: Navigate to /projects -> View list of projects -> Click project to see details -> View project details and related tasks

Navigate to /projects -> Click Create new project -> Fill project details leaving a required field blank -> Click create -> See validation error indicating missing required fields -> Remain on create project form

features.name: Settings
features.description: Enable users to update their profile and application preferences and persist changes.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Update profile fields -> Modify preferences -> Click Save settings -> See success confirmation and updated values reflected in the UI
Navigate to /settings without a valid session cookie -> Be redirected to /login

features.name: Dashboard Viewing
features.description: View overall metrics and dashboard widgets
